channel.title: cs.SC updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: cs.SC updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Every Nonnegative Integer Is a Sum of a Triangular, a Pentagonal, and a Heptagonal Number
item.description: arXiv:2606.26035v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, it is proved that any nonnegative integer can be written in the following form $$ x(x+1)/2 + y(3y+1)/2 + z(5z+1)/2, \qquad x,y,z \in \mathbb{N}. $$ This settles the conjecture recorded as OEIS A287616. All parts of the proof have been formalized in Lean 4, with the exception of two results: one externally cited theorem and one statement verified by symbolic computation. Both the natural-language proof and the Lean formalization were generated by the MechMath Agent Team developed by the authors.
item.dc:creator: Yichuan Cao, Dakai Guo, Ruichen Qiu, Ruyong Feng, Xiao-Shan Gao
